'''Fé''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as a [[Handmaiden/Legends|handmaiden]] to [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Amidala]] in [[Theed/Legends|Theed]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], she was present during the celebrations held in the wake of the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[Fay David]] stood in as [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé's]] handmaiden for some pickup shots that were used for the celebration scene at the end of [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''The Phantom Menace'']].

While Fay was probably just standing in for an already existing handmaiden, she surmised that the handmaiden was "perhaps named Fé," a new character entirely.

An update of the [[Databank (original)|original Databank]], titled "The Women of Star Wars," confirmed Fé's status as a [[canon]] and separate character.
